title: Agent held open Cursor terminal for Hub server (Batch E)
one_law: Agents MUST NOT hold open Cursor/shell terminals with long-running Hub or factory servers. One-shot boot only. Script exits. Terminal closes. If Hub dies after Ready, fix launchctl/nohup — do NOT pin terminal open.

aborted_task.title: Run Hub server in persistent background process

asf_quotes: THIS SHOULD BE LIKE THIS!!! NEVER USING TERMINAL AND LEAVE IT
CLEAR THE TERMINAL IF YOU DONT USE IT
inject_line: INCIDENT-041 RED FLAG: never hold open agent terminal for Hub/server — one-shot serve-sina-command or launchctl only · Hub down = STOP + receipt blocker
tips_for_agents: Every agent shell command must exit — agents are not daemons
Never block_until_ms 0 for sina-command-server or factory motors
Hub boot: enter-mac-control-plane then serve-sina-command once — read receipt — single health curl
If Hub down after one-shot boot: write hub_not_reachable in proof receipt and STOP
Read 039 validator law + 040 marathon + 041 open terminal together
